messages.content: translate
I am sorry, but you have not provided any text for me to translate. Please provide the text you want me to translate and the language you want it translated to.
【弘樹】「これは、これは・・・。ご丁寧に、どうも」
[ Hiroki ] "Well, well... Thank you for your kindness."
other translation
[ Hiroki ] "Oh my, oh my... How kind of you, thank you very much."
【彩香】「温泉旅行一週間のご当選、おめでとうございます。遠路遥々、よくお越しくださいました」
[ Ayaka ] "Congratulations on winning the one-week hot springs trip. Thank you for coming all the way here from afar."
【弘樹】「ご当選？なんですか、それ？」
[ Hiroki ] "Winning? What do you mean by that?"
【彩香】「あ、はい。『古山弘樹』様ご本人で、いらっしゃいますよね？」
[ Ayaka ] "Ah, yes. You are 'Hiroki Furuyama,' and you are the one who won the prize, correct?"
【弘樹】「確かに俺・・・私は『古山弘樹』本人ですが？あ、でも予約は、ウチの両親がしてくれたので・・・」
[ Hiroki ] "Yes, I am certainly the person you are looking for, 'Hiroki Furuyama.' But, as for the reservation, my parents made it on my behalf..."
【彩香】「あぁ、なるほどです～。いえ、ご家族の御方であればダイジョウブですよ。そうですよね。一名様ですものね」
[ Ayaka ] "I see, I understand. Well, if it's a family member making the reservation, it's okay. After all, it's just for one person, isn't it?"
other translation
[ Ayaka ] "Oh, I see... I understand. Well, that's alright then. Since your family members made the reservation for you. After all, it's only for one person, right?"
other translation
[ Ayaka ] "Oh, I understand now. It's fine since it is a reservation made by your family members on your behalf. That's right, it's only for one person, isn't it?"
【弘樹】「あの？何がでしょう？」
[ Hiroki ] "Excuse me? What is it?"
【彩香】「９月に『中村六道商店街』で、縁日やっていましたよねー」
[ Ayaka ] "In September, the 'Nakamura Rokudo Shopping Street' held a festival with various stalls and games, right?"
